flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Asheville-Buncombe Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Asheville-Buncombe Technical Community College rose 84% between 2006 and 2009 (13.8% → 25.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Asheville-Buncombe Technical Community College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1k → 5.1k).
